headline: Quiet Monday with no meetings, emails, or Slack activity — use the open calendar to make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evaluations design doc (AE-1079).

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into open customer escalations. Fix credentials ASAP.
Snowflake metrics integration is down (empty password) — no telemetry data for MBR dashboard or adoption tracking.
AE-1079 has no due date set — consider adding one to create accountability and signal priority to the team.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring observability (Salesforce/Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that underpins a key 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data is unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc is the most impactful adoption-driving work available today.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday: no meetings, no emails, no Slack activity — a rare deep-work day. Top priority is making real progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evaluations design doc), which is your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Second priority: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility into escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today.
